name: UTG INC
business: UTG is an insurance holding company. Its principal subsidiary, Universal Guaranty Life Insurance Company, sells individual life insurance products and services existing policies. The company also provides third-party administration services to other insurers.
sellsTo: individuals in Illinois, Ohio, and Texas

exposures.sentence: The Company s dominant business is individual life insurance, which includes the servicing of existing insurance business in-force, the acquisition of other companies in the insurance business, and the administration processing of life insurance business for other entities.
The Company owns a variety of investments associated with the oil and gas industry.
Earnings from the real estate portfolio represented 56% of the total consolidated net investment income for the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024.
